job_title: EUV Mask Technology FEOL RND Engineer
job_description:
• Information and rights:If you prefer not to have your application processed using the AI-assisted tools described above, you may submit your resume directly to TA_EMEA@micron.
• The Platform will assign a match score based on how closely your stated and inferred skills match the requirements for the open role based on the content of your application, the Platform’s analysis described above and Micron’s configuration of the skill and AI qualification matching software.
• Impact on Employment Decisions: The Eightfold AI recruiting software generates matching scores and skill inferences.
• Type of AI Technology: Micron uses the Eightfold AI recruiting software, a machine-learning talent-intelligence platform that uses natural-language processing to parse resumes, infer candidate skills and calculate compatibility scores with open positions.
• If you prefer not to have your application processed using the AI-assisted tools described above, you may submit your resume directly to TA_EMEA@micron.
• The Purpose for Which It Is Used: The Eightfold AI recruiting software is used to: (a) identify skills from your resume and career history.
• (b) match your qualifications against role requirements.
• The Platform will use AI to inform the human recruiter of skills you may have that are not listed on your resume, based on your career history and work experience listed in your resume or other application materials.

job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

• Minimum QualificationsStrong programming skills in Python, Java and Go for building scalable distributed and ML systems.
• Experience in machine learning, NLP, IR, or more recently Large Language Model ( LLMs).
• Ability to translate product goals into technical solutions, improving user experience.
• Strong communication, collaboration, and analytical problem-solving skills.
